CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK( product_line__c), "", IF(CONTAINS("PUF:UV", product_line__c), "MOLECULAR SPECTROSCOPY", IF(CONTAINS("GC:GCM:LC:MMS:MBA:LCA",product_line__c),"CHROMATOGRAPHY", IF(CONTAINS("UVS:TEA:IR:ICP:MAS:AA",product_line__c),"SPECTROSCOPY", IF(CONTAINS("PER:DCS:DLS:DSS:PIV:DEL:IMG:AM:DAB:DAO:DL:EXT:FN:GM:IMF:LM:RVA:SKC:TXV:FTF:BIO:CDI:LCM:SSS:MZG:PCK", product_line__c), "FOOD", IF(CONTAINS("TA", product_line__c), "THERMAL/ELEMENTAL",
IF(CONTAINS("MDX:NAP:ARS:AWS:APS:CLH:MOX:NEX:MFT:SPS:AGO:RHS:SDX:HMG:MAO:NMO", product_line__c), "APPLIED GENOMICS", IF(CONTAINS("NEO:CCM:PRE:DIA:CHS:MSD:VIR:NPT", product_line__c), "REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH", IF(CONTAINS("MPS:TIP:TKS:ANP:FGP:ARI:ARP:CSA:GIP:PGI:PRD:SCN:SPT:TOF:RRC:PCL:MCB:NUC", product_line__c), "BIO-D DISCO OPS", IF(CONTAINS("GEN", product_line__c), "CORD BLOOD BANKING", IF(CONTAINS("EIM", product_line__c), "EUROIMMUN", IF(CONTAINS("ILB:ICL ", product_line__c), "GENETIC TESTING SERVICES", IF(CONTAINS("GSG", product_line__c), "GOOD START GENETICS", IF(CONTAINS("IDO:LVI:MLD:PBR:HCS:IAS:LSB:INV:EZR:QTS", product_line__c), "IMAGING & DETECTION", IF(CONTAINS("CHE:ESS:LIM:ELM:GPZ:ENT:QAS:AVS:AVC:ISS:DSK:SIG:IFO:ATT:SPL:SRV", product_line__c), "INFORMATICS", IF(CONTAINS("ASY", product_line__c), "LIGHTING", IF(CONTAINS("SER", product_line__c), "LS SERVICE", IF(CONTAINS("SCI:DEX:CMS:ASG:ASP:MIO", product_line__c), "MEDICAL IMAGING", IF(CONTAINS("ABI:AGT:OMV:TMO:OSO:WAT:OSAM:OSC:OSSS:OSIS:OSRL:OSAI", product_line__c), "MULTI-VENDOR", IF(CONTAINS("NTD", product_line__c), "NTD LABS", IF(CONTAINS("ONC", product_line__c), "ONCOLOGY", IF(CONTAINS("CSC:GSO:RES:BAR:DIAC:DLF:SDO:CRT:CRD:NLB:DNA:EDO:AIG:ECO:FAB:LOP:OTH:PHM:LAA:ABG:AGP:BLC:CDS:CE:CHM:DNH:DNP:DNV:DU:HID:ASO:MGA:MIG:MMB:NIR:OCC:PBC:PBG:PCS:PHV:PSN:SDS:TRX:UPA:LHO:WEB:AGN:BIZ:BMC:CPC:DNE:DNS:ESI:SVC:-DU:BLS:DDV:BIM:CRS:MMO:DIS:LSO:ASE:ADS:CMG:DIO:MLB:AGP:FLR:MCO:RAM:UVP:CHD:CHO", product_line__c), "OTHER", IF(CONTAINS("TIS:NVS:TSC:QPS:TBR", product_line__c), "QUANTITATIVE PATHOLOGY", IF(CONTAINS("RSO:MOL:RRS:CLR:RRD:HTS:CKP:FAP:HCA", product_line__c), "RADS & SERVICE", IF(CONTAINS("EMV:SVO:SVA:MET", product_line__c), "SERVICE", IF(CONTAINS("SGL", product_line__c), "SIGNATURE GENOMICS LAB", IF(CONTAINS("TLP", product_line__c), "TULIP DIAGNOSTICS", IF(CONTAINS("HTSC:ZZZ:HHO:EHO:BEA", product_line__c), "UNCODED", IF(CONTAINS("VNT", product_line__c), "VERINATA HEALTH", IF(CONTAINS("CSB:CVD", product_line__c), "CISBIO BIOASSAYS", IF(CONTAINS("HBE:HBP:HCE:HDX:HOS:HRR:HZN", product_line__c), "HORIZON DISCOVERY", "PRODUCT LINE IN QUESTION")))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: SUB BUSINESS UNIT
